message:
feat(pthread): add shared futex support and expand conformance test suite

pthread_abi changes:
- Refactor futex_wait_timed_private into a generic futex_wait_timed
  that accepts a `private` flag controlling FUTEX_PRIVATE_FLAG
- Add futex_wait_timed_shared for process-shared synchronization
  primitives (needed for PTHREAD_PROCESS_SHARED condvars/mutexes)
- Preserve futex_wait_timed_private as a thin wrapper for backwards
  compatibility with existing callers
- Add corresponding unit tests for shared futex wait behavior

New conformance test modules:
- allocator_conformance_test: validates malloc/calloc/realloc/free
  behavior including alignment, zero-size, and overflow edge cases
- resolver_conformance_test: validates getaddrinfo/getnameinfo with
  localhost, IPv4/IPv6, and service resolution
- virtual_memory_ops_conformance_test: validates mmap/munmap/mprotect
  with MAP_ANONYMOUS, MAP_PRIVATE, protection changes
- wide_string_ops_conformance_test: validates wcslen/wcscpy/wcsncpy/
  wcscat/wcscmp/wcsncmp for basic wide string operations

Also expands the conformance executor for new test routing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
